acceptance_targets: [chapter_11_prose_001] At the revised passages anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:169, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:258, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:440, each narration sentence is grammatically complete on its own. Fail if any of those beats still read like telegraphic notes that require the previous sentence to supply the missing subject or verb.

[chapter_11_prose_002] Read the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:75, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:239, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:362, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:386, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:416 in sequence. Pass only if no more than two of those beats still rely on a corrective negation turn and each surviving instance feels scene-specific rather than interchangeable.

findings.acceptance_test: At the revised passages anchored to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:169, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:258, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:440, each narration sentence is grammatically complete on its own. Fail if any of those beats still read like telegraphic notes that require the previous sentence to supply the missing subject or verb.
findings.problem: The narration repeatedly slips into clipped noun-phrase fragments and subjectless shorthand ('The missing tray.' 'Another Bridge stalls.' 'Signs, songs...' 'Green from one house.') instead of fully rendered sentences. Because this recurs across multiple scenes, it reads less like pressure-shaped rhythm and more like constitutional anti-ellipsis drift.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the fragment clusters at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:169, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:233, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:258, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:440 into grammatically complete narration while preserving Silas's close-third urgency. Keep the snap, but make the prose carry its own subjects and verbs instead of borrowing them from the sentence before.

findings.acceptance_test: Read the revised narration at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:75, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:239, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:362, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:386, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:416 in sequence. Pass only if no more than two of those beats still rely on a corrective negation turn and each surviving instance feels scene-specific rather than interchangeable.
findings.problem: A corrective-negation sentence shape recurs often enough to feel automatic: the prose keeps arriving by telling the reader what a moment is not before stating what it is. Used this many times in one chapter, the move stops feeling precise and starts sounding like a house mannerism.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the interpretive move at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:75, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:239, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:362, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:386, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:416. Replace several of these 'not/no ... but/exactly' beats with direct positive description, action, or image so the chapter stops leaning on the same rhetorical hinge.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's strange civic biology, vulgar humor, erotic consequence, and class abrasion. When a choice appears between the cleaner version and the truer, messier one, choose the messier version so long as causality and character truth remain exact. Treat the city's slime, smell, heat, and appetite as part of the novel's beauty rather than embarrassment to be polished away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, shame, hunger, class humiliation, bodily mess, or economic pressure starts drifting into decorous vagueness, rewrite until the scene carries concrete sensory and social cost on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should signal emphasis, class performance, ceremonial language, or Gideon's deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate crowd scenes with cleanup, ritual with labor, public humiliation with private tenderness, and single-sweep chapters with multi-scene accumulations; no two consecutive chapters should feel built from the same emotional weather, dialogue density, or scene rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-aware but not museum-stiff; vivid, bodily, class-conscious, and willing to be ugly or funny without slipping into arch parody or modern snark.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored to Silas Vale for the full novel, with no head-hopping and no neutral historian voice; Inez remains legible through observed action, dialogue, and the objects she shares.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Elastic and pressure-sensitive: quick comic snap in public scenes, thicker sensory accumulation in labor and erotic passages, and hard clean sentences at moments of shame or decision.
